issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for ingestion, chunking, or retrieval.
The skill is vendor-locked to LlamaIndex and does not support other AI frameworks.

scenarios.name: RAG over internal docs with citations
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses SimpleDirectoryReader, IngestionPipeline with title/summary metadata extractors and deduplication, SentenceSplitter at 1024 tokens with 200 overlap, VectorStoreIndex, and CitationQueryEngine for source attribution — all named in the skill; baseline writes a generic LangChain-style or hand-rolled RAG that misses CitationQueryEngine and metadata extractor pattern.

scenarios.name: Multi-source ReAct agent across docs, SQL, and web
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wraps each source as QueryEngineTool, builds a ReActAgent that routes, and uses SubQuestionQueryEngine for multi-part queries plus CorrectnessEvaluator/FaithfulnessEvaluator on a test set as instructed; baseline implements a generic tool-using agent without QueryEngineTool/SubQuestionQueryEngine or the named evaluators.
